# Story 3.11: Logout Dropdown cho POS và Admin — gọi API logout, clear session, redirect login

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-22. Ultimate context engine analysis completed - comprehensive developer guide created. -->

## Story

As a cashier or admin,
I want click icon/avatar user profile trên `/pos` và `/admin` để mở menu có mục `Đăng xuất`, và khi chọn thì hệ thống đăng xuất an toàn,
so that tôi có thể kết thúc phiên làm việc rõ ràng, refresh cookie được revoke phía backend khi có thể, token/session cục bộ luôn bị xoá, và trình duyệt quay về `/login` bằng replace để không quay lại màn hình đã đăng nhập qua nút Back.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **POS user avatar mở dropdown logout:** Given user đang ở `/pos`, when click avatar/initial trong `PosTopAppBar`, then mở dropdown/menu accessible hiển thị đúng một action chính `Đăng xuất`; menu dùng tiếng Việt, hỗ trợ keyboard/focus cơ bản, không làm thay đổi search, sync button, admin settings link, connectivity indicator, pending counter, Obsidian Light theme hoặc layout POS hiện có.
2. **Admin user dropdown logout:** Given user đang ở bất kỳ route `/admin/*`, when click user chip/avatar trong top app bar Admin, then dropdown hiển thị user identity từ `useSessionStore.currentUser` thay vì hard-code TailAdmin demo (`Musharof`, `randomuser@pimjo.com`) và có action `Đăng xuất`; không link tới `/signin` hoặc `/profile` demo cho logout.
3. **Logout gọi backend API đúng contract:** Given user chọn `Đăng xuất`, when client có session, then gọi `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` thông qua `apiClient.post('/auth/logout', undefined, { withCredentials: true })` hoặc wrapper tương đương trong `features/auth/api.ts`; request interceptor tự gắn Bearer token từ IndexedDB nếu session còn hạn; không hardcode host/prefix vì `apiClient.baseURL` đã chứa API base.
4. **Luôn clear local session và redirect bằng replace:** Given user chọn `Đăng xuất`, when API logout thành công `204`, then xoá `db.session` qua `clearSession()`, xoá Zustand session state qua `useSessionStore.clearSessionState()`, đóng dropdown, và điều hướng tới `/login` bằng React Router `navigate('/login', { replace: true })` (hoặc route-safe helper tương đương) để Back không quay lại `/pos` hoặc `/admin` đã đăng nhập.
5. **API/network fail vẫn đăng xuất local:** Given `POST /auth/logout` fail do 401/403/5xx/network/offline, when user chọn `Đăng xuất`, then vẫn clear `db.session`, clear Zustand session state, và redirect `/login` bằng replace; ghi `console.warn` hoặc dispatch toast theo convention hiện có với message non-technical tiếng Việt (ví dụ `Đã đăng xuất khỏi thiết bị này. Không thể xác nhận với máy chủ.`) nhưng không block redirect và không expose raw stack/detail.
6. **Loading/idempotency:** Given request logout đang chạy, when user click `Đăng xuất` nhiều lần hoặc Enter nhiều lần, then chỉ có tối đa một API request active/được khởi tạo từ UI đó, item/button logout disabled hoặc có trạng thái loading ngắn, và không throw unhandled promise rejection.
7. **Auth/session boundaries preserved:** Given Story 1.8/1.9 auth flow, when logout hoàn tất, then `ProtectedRoute`/session boot không rehydrate user cũ; access token không còn trong IndexedDB; refresh token cookie được backend clear/revoke khi API đến được; không dùng `localStorage`/`sessionStorage` cho token hoặc UI persistence.
8. **Tests:** Add/update unit/component tests for POS top app bar and Admin top app bar/user dropdown: menu opens on avatar click, renders `Đăng xuất`, calls logout API wrapper, clears IndexedDB session and Zustand state, navigates `/login` with `{ replace: true }`, and still clears/redirects when API rejects. Existing POS shell/Admin layout tests continue to pass.
9. **Regression gates:** Required before marking review: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build`; security scan `grep -R "localStorage\|sessionStorage\|dangerouslySetInnerHTML" -n pos-web/src --exclude='*.test.ts' --exclude='*.test.tsx'` has no new match attributable to this story.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [ ] Add frontend logout API wrapper and shared logout helper (AC: 3,4,5,6,7)
  - [ ] Update `pos-web/src/features/auth/api.ts` with `logout(): Promise<void>` calling `apiClient.post('/auth/logout', undefined, { withCredentials: true })`.
  - [ ] Create `pos-web/src/features/auth/logout.ts` or similarly named helper/hook to centralize the sequence: call API, catch/log failure, always `await clearSession()`, `useSessionStore.getState().clearSessionState()`, then caller navigates with replace.
  - [ ] Avoid circular imports: auth feature may import `shared/lib/api-client` and `db`; shared code must not import feature auth.
  - [ ] Make helper idempotent at UI level or expose `isLoggingOut` state via hook so POS/Admin components do not issue duplicate requests.
- [ ] Implement POS dropdown in `PosTopAppBar` (AC: 1,4,5,6)
  - [ ] Update `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-top-app-bar.tsx`: replace static user avatar block with a button/menu (native `<button>` + absolute menu, Radix dropdown if already used, or existing lightweight pattern) that preserves current visual size/classes.
  - [ ] Use `useNavigate()` and call `navigate('/login', { replace: true })` after logout cleanup.
  - [ ] Keep existing behavior: search input, `ConnectivityIndicator`, `PendingCounter`, sync panel button, admin settings link for admin users, user initial/name/role text.
  - [ ] Add accessible labels such as `aria-label="Mở menu người dùng"`; menu item text exactly `Đăng xuất`.
- [ ] Update Admin TailAdmin user dropdown (AC: 2,4,5,6)
  - [ ] Update `pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/components/header/UserDropdown.tsx` to read `currentUser` from `useSessionStore` and derive initial/email/name; remove or de-emphasize demo links (`Edit profile`, `Account settings`, `Support`) unless product wants to keep them disabled/non-primary; logout must not be `<Link to="/signin">`.
  - [ ] Use `useNavigate()` and the shared logout helper; redirect to `/login` with replace.
  - [ ] Preserve TailAdmin styling classes and dropdown positioning used by Story 3.10, but localize visible action to Vietnamese.
- [ ] Add/update tests (AC: 8)
  - [ ] Add `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-top-app-bar.test.tsx` or extend existing POS shell tests to cover avatar click → `Đăng xuất` → API called → session cleared → navigate replace.
  - [ ] Add/extend Admin dropdown/header test, e.g. `pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/components/header/UserDropdown.test.tsx` or existing admin top app bar test, with MemoryRouter/Vitest mocks.
  - [ ] Test failure path: mock `logout()`/`apiClient.post` rejection and assert local clear + navigate still happen, plus warning/toast if implemented.
  - [ ] Seed Dexie `db.session` or mock `clearSession()` explicitly; reset Zustand store after each test.
- [ ] Run verification and update Dev Agent Record (AC: 9)
  - [ ] Run required gates and record outputs.
  - [ ] Run security grep and record output.
  - [ ] Manually smoke check `/pos` and `/admin/*`: dropdown opens, logout redirects, Back does not return to authenticated surface.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns only logout UX and frontend orchestration for `/pos` and `/admin`: dropdown/menu, API call, local session cleanup, and replace redirect.
- Backend `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` already exists and is done in Story 1.5. Do not modify backend unless a verified contract bug blocks the FE story.
- Do not implement CI/pre-commit Story 1.10 here. Although `sprint-status.yaml` still has `1-10` as backlog, this feature request is a targeted new Admin/POS logout story and should not run `dev-story`.

### Existing implementation state to preserve

- `pos-web/src/features/auth/api.ts` currently exports `login()` and `refresh()` only. It uses `apiClient` with paths `/auth/login` and `/auth/refresh`; add `/auth/logout` consistently, not `/api/v1/auth/logout` literal. [`pos-web/src/features/auth/api.ts`]
- `pos-web/src/features/auth/token-store.ts` already exports `clearSession(): Promise<void>` deleting Dexie row `id: 'current'`. Reuse it. [`pos-web/src/features/auth/token-store.ts`]
- `pos-web/src/features/auth/session-store.ts` already exports Zustand `clearSessionState(message?: string)`. Reuse it to clear `currentUser`, `isAuthenticated`, and auth message. [`pos-web/src/features/auth/session-store.ts`]
- `pos-web/src/features/auth/interceptor.ts` request interceptor attaches Bearer token from IndexedDB and skips only `/auth/login` + `/auth/refresh`; logout should therefore get Authorization automatically. It also has refresh/expired behavior; logout failure should still proceed with local cleanup. [`pos-web/src/features/auth/interceptor.ts`]
- Root layout wraps routes with `SessionBootProvider`, keeps global SyncRetryPanel/MenuUpdatedToast, and hides the old global header for `/pos` and `/admin`. Do not reintroduce the old header. [`pos-web/src/routes/_layout.tsx`]
- POS `PosTopAppBar` currently shows initial/name/role as static non-clickable block. It must become clickable/dropdown without changing surrounding POS layout classes. [`pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-top-app-bar.tsx`]
- Admin TailAdmin `UserDropdown` currently contains hard-coded demo identity and a `Sign out` link to `/signin`. Replace with real user data and real logout to `/login`. [`pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/components/header/UserDropdown.tsx`]
- Admin top bar is TailAdmin `AppHeader` importing `UserDropdown`. Preserve Story 3.10 classes and Zustand sidebar behavior. [`pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/layout/AppHeader.tsx`]

### API contract and security guardrails

- Backend contract from Story 1.5: `POST /api/v1/auth/logout` requires Bearer access token, clears `refresh_token` + `csrf_token` cookies, revokes matching active refresh token when present, returns `204 No Content`. Frontend path should be `/auth/logout` through `apiClient` because base URL/prefix is configured externally. [`_bmad-output/implementation-artifacts/1-5-auth-backend-endpoints-login-refresh-logout.md`]
- `withCredentials: true` is required so backend can receive/clear refresh cookie. Bearer should come from existing interceptor; do not manually read token in UI components.
- Local cleanup is mandatory even when API fails. This prevents user lock-in/offline logout failure and matches the requested behavior.
- No token persistence in `localStorage` or `sessionStorage`; no password/token logging; no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.
- Use Vietnamese user-facing copy. Acceptable failure toast/log copy: `Đã đăng xuất khỏi thiết bị này. Không thể xác nhận với máy chủ.` Prefer `console.warn('[auth] Logout API failed; cleared local session only', error)` for developer logging if toast wiring is uncertain.

### UX/accessibility requirements

- Dropdown trigger must be a real `<button type="button">` with an accessible name (`Mở menu người dùng` or similar), visible focus ring/hover state, and menu item reachable by keyboard.
- Menu item text must be `Đăng xuất` (not `Sign out`, not `/signin`).
- Keep POS Obsidian Light design from Story 2.15 unchanged: top app bar height 64px, current tokens/classes, search behavior, sync controls.
- Keep Admin TailAdmin design from Story 3.10 unchanged: dropdown card `bg-white border border-admin-gray-200 rounded-xl/2xl shadow...`, font/admin tokens, current sidebar/header behavior.

### Suggested implementation pattern

```ts
// pos-web/src/features/auth/api.ts
export async function logout(): Promise<void> {
  await apiClient.post('/auth/logout', undefined, { withCredentials: true })
}
```

```ts
// pos-web/src/features/auth/logout.ts
import { logout as logoutApi } from './api'
import { clearSession } from './token-store'
import { useSessionStore } from './session-store'

export async function performLogout(): Promise<{ apiFailed: boolean }> {
  let apiFailed = false
  try {
    await logoutApi()
  } catch (error) {
    apiFailed = true
    console.warn('[auth] Logout API failed; cleared local session only', error)
    window.dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('toast', { detail: 'Đã đăng xuất khỏi thiết bị này. Không thể xác nhận với máy chủ.' }))
  } finally {
    await clearSession()
    useSessionStore.getState().clearSessionState()
  }
  return { apiFailed }
}
```

Components can then guard duplicate clicks with local `isLoggingOut` state and call `navigate('/login', { replace: true })` in `finally` after `performLogout()` resolves.

### Testing standards

- Framework: Vitest + Testing Library + `fake-indexeddb/auto` where Dexie is used.
- For navigation assertions, mock `useNavigate` from `react-router-dom` or render under a router with a test route that can observe replacement; simplest is `vi.mock('react-router-dom', async importOriginal => ({ ...actual, useNavigate: () => navigateMock }))` in focused component tests.
- Mock API at wrapper level (`features/auth/api.logout`) for success/failure tests; integration-like tests may seed Dexie and assert `getCurrentSession()` is undefined after click.
- Reset `useSessionStore` and Dexie tables in `afterEach` to avoid leaking auth state between tests.
- Assert no duplicate API calls when double-clicking while loading.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 1.8 explicitly did not own logout button UX; it established `api.ts`, Dexie session helpers, Zustand session store, and interceptor. Extend these rather than creating a parallel auth/session mechanism.
- Story 1.9 owns boot/reload route guards; logout must leave those guards with no session to rehydrate.
- Story 2.15 POS redesign is currently `review`; do not disturb POS visual regression scope beyond making avatar/user chip clickable.
- Story 3.10 Admin redesign is `done`; it already introduced a TailAdmin dropdown but with demo identity and `/signin` link. This story should convert that existing component to real logout behavior, not create a second admin top app bar.

### File structure requirements

Expected files to update/add:

```text
pos-web/src/features/auth/api.ts                         # add logout() wrapper
pos-web/src/features/auth/logout.ts                      # new shared performLogout helper or hook
pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-top-app-bar.tsx               # add user dropdown/menu
pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-top-app-bar.test.tsx          # new/updated tests
pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/components/header/UserDropdown.tsx      # real user + logout
pos-web/src/routes/admin/tailadmin/components/header/UserDropdown.test.tsx  # new/updated tests
```

If implementation chooses a hook instead of `logout.ts`, keep it inside `features/auth/` and document the exact file in Dev Agent Record.
